---
title: "The legacy pandas edition of Tidy Finance with Python (unmaintained archive)"
author:
  - name: Christoph Scheuch
    url: https://www.linkedin.com/in/christophscheuch/
    affiliations:
      - name: Independent
  - name: Stefan Voigt
    url: https://www.voigtstefan.me/
    affiliations:
      - name: University of Copenhagen
      - name: Danish Finance Institute
  - name: Patrick Weiss
    url: https://sites.google.com/view/patrick-weiss
    affiliations:
      - name: Reykjavik University
      - name: WU Vienna University of Economics and Business
date: "2026-06-19"
description: >
  We migrated Tidy Finance with Python from pandas to polars and merged the R
  and Python editions into unified chapters. For reference, this post archives
  the complete rendered output of the previous pandas edition. It is no longer
  maintained.
image: thumbnail.jpg
image-alt: "Cover of Tidy Finance with Python, marked as an archived edition."
categories:
  - Python
  - Data
eval: false
---

::: {.callout-warning title="Unmaintained archive"}
The pages linked below are a **frozen snapshot** of the original *pandas* edition
of *Tidy Finance with Python*, captured in June 2026. They are provided **for
reference only**:

- The code is **no longer maintained** and may not run with current versions of
  `pandas`, `numpy`, or our data providers.
- The **maintained edition** — covering both R and Python (now using
  [polars](https://pola.rs/)) in unified chapters — lives at
  [tidy-finance.org/chapters](https://www.tidy-finance.org/chapters/working-with-stock-returns.html).
- Only the rendered output is preserved here; the original `.qmd` sources are
  not kept.
:::

## Why we changed

We rebuilt *Tidy Finance with Python* around [polars](https://pola.rs/) instead
of pandas, and merged the separate R and Python books into a single set of
chapters with side-by-side language tabs. The motivation: faster and more
memory-efficient data wrangling, closer parity between the R and Python code,
and a single source of truth that is easier to keep in sync.

Because the previous edition will not be updated, we archive its full rendered
output below so existing readers, bookmarks, and citations still have somewhere
to land.

## Archived chapters

> These are static, unmaintained pages. Each one carries a banner linking back
> to the maintained edition.

**Front matter**

- [Welcome](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/index.html)

**Prerequisites**

- [Setting Up Your Environment](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/setting-up-your-environment.html)
- [The tidyfinance Python Package](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/the-tidyfinance-python-package.html)

**Getting Started**

- [Working with Stock Returns](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/working-with-stock-returns.html)
- [Modern Portfolio Theory](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/modern-portfolio-theory.html)
- [Capital Asset Pricing Model](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/capital-asset-pricing-model.html)
- [Financial Statement Analysis](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/financial-statement-analysis.html)
- [Discounted Cash Flow Analysis](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/discounted-cash-flow-analysis.html)

**Financial Data**

- [Accessing and Managing Financial Data](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/accessing-and-managing-financial-data.html)
- [WRDS, CRSP, and Compustat](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/wrds-crsp-and-compustat.html)
- [TRACE and FISD](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/trace-and-fisd.html)
- [Other Data Providers](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/other-data-providers.html)

**Asset Pricing**

- [Beta Estimation](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/beta-estimation.html)
- [Univariate Portfolio Sorts](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/univariate-portfolio-sorts.html)
- [Size Sorts and p-Hacking](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/size-sorts-and-p-hacking.html)
- [Value and Bivariate Sorts](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/value-and-bivariate-sorts.html)
- [Replicating Fama and French Factors](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/replicating-fama-and-french-factors.html)
- [Fama-MacBeth Regressions](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/fama-macbeth-regressions.html)

**Modeling and Machine Learning**

- [Fixed Effects and Clustered Standard Errors](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/fixed-effects-and-clustered-standard-errors.html)
- [Difference in Differences](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/difference-in-differences.html)
- [Factor Selection via Machine Learning](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/factor-selection-via-machine-learning.html)
- [Option Pricing via Machine Learning](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/option-pricing-via-machine-learning.html)

**Portfolio Optimization**

- [Parametric Portfolio Policies](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/parametric-portfolio-policies.html)
- [Constrained Optimization and Backtesting](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/constrained-optimization-and-backtesting.html)

**Appendix**

- [WRDS Dummy Data](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/wrds-dummy-data.html)
- [Clean Enhanced TRACE with Python](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/clean-enhanced-trace-with-python.html)
- [Proofs](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/proofs.html)
- [Cover Image](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/cover-image.html)
- [Colophon](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/colophon.html)
- [Changelog](https://www.tidy-finance.org/legacy-python-pandas/changelog.html)
